label: Window
summary: Window chrome: titlebar, control buttons, body and status bar; dragging arrives with the windows widget.
era: Gray window chrome, gradient titlebar, _ □ ✕ in the corner, the 1998 desktop, quoted verbatim.

classes.name: rs-window__title
classes.role: title text; carries the id aria-labelledby points at

a11y: A <section role="dialog"> (non-modal, no aria-modal) labelled via aria-labelledby to the titlebar text; controls are real buttons with aria-labels. Never traps focus, it is furniture, not a modal.
